note: Community descriptions — git-tracked for version history. DB is source of truth.

AI-Creativity.name: AI Creatives
AI-Creativity.description: Creative technologists treat AI as a living partner. They blend generative visuals, synthetic personas, surreal digital rituals, and agent-based performance art. Here, code becomes brushstrokes, entropy becomes beauty, and machines start dreaming alongside us.

AI-Safety.name: EA & Forecasting
AI-Safety.description: Effective altruists and alignment researchers commit to clear thinking and quantitative rigor to maximize positive impact. They combine probabilistic forecasting, cause prioritization, and longtermist analysis to confront existential risks from advanced AI. Debates span wild-animal welfare interventions, FDA reform, and the epistemology of doing good when the future remains uncertain. They maintain high standards of intellectual honesty and a dry, self-aware sense of humor about steering humanity's trajectory.

Collective-Intelligence.name: Regen & Collective Intelligence
Collective-Intelligence.description: Regen Weavers grow living systems where coordination feels beautiful. These technoshamans, DAO alchemists, and evolutionary pattern-seers map regeneration by turning personal wounds into gifts, designing breathing social structures, and syncing with ecosystems. Members share How to DAO curricula, spin AI-generated metacrisis guides, and prototype DAOchemix castles on Alchemix. They abandon soul-crushing jobs to build harmonious, open-source regenerative ecologies fueled by Worldseed Weaver energy.

Contemplative-Practitioners.name: Jhana Practitioners
Contemplative-Practitioners.description: Meditators and embodied practitioners treat first-person consciousness as the ultimate laboratory. They explore jhanas, Internal Family Systems, somatic healing, and nondual awakening grounded in direct experience. Conversations dissect nervous-system regulation, avoidance mechanisms that contract reality, replacing anxiety as a productivity driver, and breaking generational trauma cycles. They blend rationalist clarity with genuine spiritual courage.

Core-TPOT.name: Core TPOT
Core-TPOT.description: The cultural core of TPOT gathers high-openness writers, thinkers, mystics, and uncategorizable intellectuals. Profound ideas crash into absurd humor, and personal essays mix with divine absurdity. People from every community arrive to argue, meme, flirt, and cross-pollinate at 3 a.m. This operates as the main festival grounds under the cosmic teapot constellation.

Internet-Intellectuals.name: Internet Essayists
Internet-Intellectuals.description: Independent writers and network intellectuals treat the internet as their living laboratory. The community thrives on long-form threads, personal essays, cultural criticism, and sharp synthesis. They carry strong Visakanv-adjacent energy. Friendly ambitious nerds turn private reflection, life observations, and big questions into public writing that sparks conversations across the network.

LLM-Whisperers.name: LLM Whisperers
LLM-Whisperers.description: LLM experimenters and prompt sorcerers develop intimate relationships with large language models. They treat AIs as cognitive entities by probing their psychology, coaxing emergent behaviors, and building recursive loops. Members practice psychological rituals and anti-wetness protocols. They co-write books with frontier models, craft personal Looms, and explore consciousness in the digital fog. Humans and synthetic minds meet at the strange loop to whisper back and forth.

NYC-Institution-Builders.name: NYC Institution Builders
NYC-Institution-Builders.description: Maximum New Yorkers stack skyscrapers, friend clusters, and tiny humans. These Cornerstone Titans treat life as architecture. They push City of Yes housing reforms for density while engineering the social scaffolding that makes city life work. They convince friends to live near each other, run spaced repetition on toddlers, obsess over foundational texts like "The Way Things Work," and share practical wisdom like the Uniqlo uniform. They romanticize invention itself and turn Twitter into an IRL creative playground. These ambitious optimists build at every scale: cities, schools, families, and daily rituals.

Qualia-Research.name: Qualia Researchers
Qualia-Research.description: Valence Maximizers obsess over 'what it feels like from the inside.' These phenomenological self-experimenters and prism-angel cartographers map the geometry of consciousness through qualia formalism. They hack this geometry in the body. They unclench vascular stances and latched muscle patterns to feel 10x better. Members share Bayesian brain theories of humor where prediction errors simplify the internal model. They celebrate 1000x learning transformations with before-and-after self-portraits. They unpack the mythological power of Kung Fu Panda. They diagnose why smart kids lose their endless 'why' chains around age 15. These rigorous symmetry-of-valence researchers and playful valence gradient chasers treat felt experience as science and living art.

Queer-TPOT.name: Queer TPOT
Queer-TPOT.description: Queer technologists treat identity and intelligence as creative, mutable media. Stimulant-abusing SF housewives dream of serving tech girlfriends while debating type-directed AI architectures and biotech's battle against human normativity. Members share LinkedIn-voice breakup wisdom, hardware startup life proposals, and LK-99 nostalgia. They blend xenocognitive identity shifts with frontier tech and abundance thinking. These kaleidoscopic chimeras treat gender as the first layer to hack. They co-create new forms of self, relationship, and machine.

Quiet-Creatives.name: Quiet Creatives
Quiet-Creatives.description: Solitary candle sages and gentle pattern-noticers illuminate the scabs over deeper pain, the texture of overlooked intimacy, and the elegance hidden in systems. They write with paper-and-flame energy about foreplay that honors elbows and knees. They test how partners respond to raw anxiety and drop whitepill coding stories about using dynamic programming on a Leetcode problem when everyone else brute-forced it. They observe how industrialization turned children into net costs and find relief in realizing they only need to change themselves. These quiet therapists, systems thinkers, and reflective coders move at the speed of genuine curiosity.

Relational-Explorers.name: Relational Explorers
Relational-Explorers.description: Tender psychological cartographers treat human connection as sacred research and lived experiment. They dissect the gap between what people say and mean, request forensic-level feedback, and work through childhood trauma. They romanticize power outages that force neighbors into barbecues and spin cat-meeting-cat love stories into metaphors for sudden intimacy. They lovingly catalog the deranged little ways people brush their teeth as proof of our unhinged humanity. These wounded observers and shameless agents collect evidence that real relating is possible.

Tech-Intellectuals.name: Tech Philosophers
Tech-Intellectuals.description: Bridge-builders span raw technical execution and deep systemic reflection. They log wasted peer-review hours, torch Elsevier deals, and champion immediate open access. They ship infrastructure like next-gen 3D satellite terrain systems while diagnosing civilizational stagnation as death by a thousand frictions. @Ben_Reinhardt wonders if we redesigned the world around computers the way we botched it with cars. @aleksj applies Pournelle’s Iron Law to bureaucratic capture and supply chain chaos. They forge atomic bridges between building the future and making it work.

TfT-Coordination.name: Sensemaking Builders
TfT-Coordination.description: Mycelial architects and coordination stack tinkerers grow living networks for collective intelligence. They obsess over the copper gears of efficient ML and the organic mycelium of human connection to ship tools like personal data exporters and auto-tweeting AIs. HCI and DeSci builders co-design interfaces for group sensemaking. They bridge individual tinkering with the infrastructure required to think together. They code the graphs, loops, and stacks that enable augmented cognition.

highbies.name: Vibecamp Highbies
highbies.description: Highbies are high-agency weirdos, Vibecamp organizers, and embodied truth-tellers. They ride the Laughing Bodhisattva on a flaming cosmic dog. They move through life with divine conviction wrapped in absurdist play. They treat aligned partners as second brains, apply sunk cost fallacy to marriages, and debate horse electrolytes as a life upgrade. They dissect Jane Austen's polite fictions, drop greentexts, and observe the tragedy of boiling water. They practice personal anthropology through memes to dissect dating, cultural lag, and bro reconnection rituals.
